name: Dinner at very high BG (15.0)
description: BG is well above targetHigh (15.0) entering the dinner window. She's had a spike — maybe a big lunch still in the system, or stress. The dinner nudge should recommend SKIPPING CARBS entirely and eating a protein/fat dinner — adding carbs on top of this would compound the problem. The evening insulin will have enough work bringing BG down without extra glucose.
